title: Enterpret Module Sentiment Report
description: Schema for AuditBoard product module customer sentiment analysis sourced from Enterpret

quote.description: A verbatim customer quote extracted from a feedback record

customer_name.description: First name, full name, or null if anonymous

nps_score.description: NPS score (0–10) if the quote came from a Qualtrics survey; null otherwise

ranked_theme.description: A single feedback theme with its rank and record count

module.description: Identifying metadata for the product module

id.description: Lowercase slug used as a stable identifier, e.g. 'issues', 'dashboards'

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in UI, e.g. 'Issues', 'Dashboards'

also_known_as.description: Alternative names or brand names for this module, e.g. ['Issue Management', 'Optro Issues']

taxonomy.description: Enterpret Knowledge Graph taxonomy path used when querying this module

zendesk_module_tags.description: Zendesk module field values or tags that map to this module

period.description: Human-readable time window covered by this report, e.g. 'Last 12 months'

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 date when this report was generated, e.g. '2026-03-28'

executive_summary.description: 2–4 sentence plain-language overview of the module's feedback landscape, total volume, dominant signal, and headline NPS finding

coverage.description: Total feedback volume and breakdown by source

total.description: Sum of all records across all sources

by_source.description: One entry per data source, ordered by record count descending

label.description: Display label with detail, e.g. 'Gong (call transcripts)'

pct.description: Percentage of total, rounded to 1 decimal

nps.description: NPS scores — overall product baseline versus module-specific

overall_baseline.description: NPS across all Qualtrics respondents in the period, regardless of module

module_specific.description: NPS restricted to Qualtrics respondents whose feedback was tagged to this module's taxonomy

gap.description: module_specific.score minus overall_baseline.score (negative = module drags NPS down)

gap_note.description: Plain-language interpretation of the gap for display in the report

category_breakdown.description: Record counts and shares by Enterpret feedback category

ratio_note.description: Callout sentence for display, e.g. 'For every 1 piece of praise there are 6 complaints or improvement requests'

top_complaints.description: Ranked complaint themes plus a deep-dive into the #1 cluster

deep_dive.description: Expanded analysis of the top complaint cluster

top_improvements.description: Ranked improvement request themes with optional thematic groupings and supporting quotes

thematic_groups.description: Higher-level groupings that combine related themes for narrative clarity

praise.description: What customers specifically appreciate about this module

help_confusion.description: Help-seeking and confusion themes — feature tier questions, terminology confusion, configuration issues

key_insight.description: Optional 1–2 sentence synthesis of the dominant help pattern

gong_call_themes.description: What surfaces in Gong sales, CS, and research calls specifically about this module

top_themes.description: Top themes from Gong calls, each tagged with its feedback category

narrative_patterns.description: Qualitative patterns identified across call types (sales, CS, research) not captured in theme counts

competitor_mentions.description: Competitor products mentioned in calls in relation to this module

integration_requests.description: External systems customers request integration with for this module

community_ideas.description: Active community feature ideas related to this module

nps_detractor_comments.description: Sample of NPS open-text comments from detractors (score 0–6) who mentioned this module, ordered lowest to highest score

priority_recommendations.description: 4–5 data-backed product recommendations ordered by feedback volume

title.description: Short imperative headline, e.g. 'Self-Service Configuration (Highest Impact)'

description.description: 1–3 sentence explanation of the recommendation and its rationale

data_basis.description: Which complaint/improvement themes or sources drive this recommendation

record_count.description: Aggregate record count supporting the recommendation
